examples: The business brings in $50,000 a month.
She brought in some snacks for the meeting.
The rental property brings in good money.
The store brings in new merchandise every week.
They bring in fresh produce daily.
The new product line brings in millions.
How much does your side job bring in?
Her investments bring in a steady income.
Please bring in the chairs from the garden.
Don't forget to bring in the mail.
example_translate: Она принесла немного закусок для встречи.
Магазин завозит новые товары каждую неделю.
bring in.synonyms:
Приносить, вносить (внутрь) - carry in, introduce
Приносить доход, прибыль - earn, generate, yield
